## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and review AI visibility tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline:** One article is ready for review. The next goal is 5 articles/week, requiring approval of \~15 topics to build a production backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - **AI Visibility:** Fleet ranks \#2 behind Microsoft in Scrunch, an AI visibility tool. The low 1% citation rate (vs. 3-4% client average) is due to a smaller content library.
  - [**Data Blocker:** Google Search Console (GSC) access is still pending. This prevents a key Looker dashboard from functioning, as it requires data from both GSC and GA4.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Current Production:** 3 articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Review Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - ["What is Apple's device enrollment program?" → Ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [Find all review drafts in the "Fleet Reviewing Drafts" Airtable view.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Next Week's Goal:** 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [Requires approving \~15 topics from the content strategy Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Build a production backlog to maintain momentum during team absences.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [**Tool:** Scrunch, an AI visibility tool that reverse-engineers LLM responses (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) to track competitive presence.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [**Fleet's Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - **Rank:** \#2 overall, behind Microsoft.
      - [**Position:** Middle of LLM-generated product lists.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Citation Rate:** 1%.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
          - [**Significance:** This is lower than the 3-4% client average.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
          - [**Cause:** Fleet's smaller content library. More educational content (how-to guides, comparisons) is needed to increase citations.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Data Complement:** Scrunch data is paired with a Looker dashboard that tracks actual LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Blocker:** This dashboard is incomplete without GSC access.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Access:** Scrunch is currently internal to GrowthX. A PDF report will be shared with Fleet's Head of Demand, Jen.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Irena & Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [Review the article "What is Apple's device enrollment program?"](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [Approve \~15 topics in the content strategy Airtable to build a production backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [Follow up with Sam to secure Google Search Console access.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [Share the Scrunch PDF report with Irena for Jen's review.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [Investigate direct Scrunch access for Fleet.](https://fathom.video/share/beS8crdSPCSx33kbtDgwLKDGzt92tpzj?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
